title: Ubiquiti UACC-OM-SFP10-1450 - CWDM optical module, SM, 10 Gbps, SFP+, 1450 nm, 2x LC
category: Ubiquiti / Optical networks / SFP optical modules / SFP+
description: Ubiquiti UACC-OM-SFP10-1450 is single-mode module type CWDM with a transmission speed of up to 10 Gbps, wavelengths of 1450 nm and is compatible with SFP and SFP+ interfaces. The module is equipped with two LC connectors and can establish a connection up to 20 km The LC connectors in the SFP+ module have UPC polishing
specsSearch: Optics Format SFP, SFP+ For cable type Single Mode Transmission speed 1 Gbps, 10 Gbps Wavelength - Tx/Rx [nm] 1450 Distance [km] 20 Transfer type CWDM Polishing type UPC Connectors and Interfaces Optical Connectors (2) LC Physical characteristics Operating temperature [°C] 0 up to 70
